name: soc-project
description: From repo root: npm run go (one command: install deps + SOC API + dashboard)

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,ui -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:ui"
scripts.dev:api:static: cd backend && cross-env SOC_SERVE_FRONTEND=1 python -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.go: npm install && npm run setup && npm run dev
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -n api,ui,victim,victim-ui -c blue,magenta,yellow,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:victim" "npm run dev:victim-ui"
scripts.go:full: npm install && npm run setup && npm run setup:victim && npm run dev:full
scripts.setup:victim: python -m pip install fastapi uvicorn requests && npm install --prefix victim_app/frontend
